TranslatedText.text: What material is your roof made of?
What type of roof do you have?
How old is your current roof?
Have you noticed any of the following in your Roof? (Select all that apply)
How much area of the roof is affected from above?
How much are the shingles curling?
How far is the Flexibility of the Shingles?
How much granule coverage do the asphalt shingles have?
Where have you seen the leakage signs?
Specify the location of leakage signs
How much area is affected from leakage?
Which flashing is damaged or missing?
What is the condition of the Flashing?
How far is the moss and lichen growth on the roof?
How far is the black algae growth on the roof?
How much is the debris accumulation?
Are you currently enrolled in any type of a roof maintenance program?
One thing to be aware of - debris and buildup can increase the risk of leaks overtime. Would it be helpful to see how a simple annual or semi-annual maintenance program can prevent that?
Does the Debris clog in Gutter & Downspouts?

What is the width of the roof?

How many Roof Vents are present in this particular roof?

Do you have chimneys on the roof?
How many chimneys are there on this facet/roof section?
